t-scaffold.codex.jsonlines\\nprompts/23-frontend-state-foundation.md\\nprompts/97-security-review.md\\nprompts/12-seed-genres-and-tones.md\\nprompts/81-docx-export-pipeline.md\\nprompts/87-developer-debug-inspector.md\\nprompts/25-chat-window-foundation.md\\nprompts/01-monorepo-skeleton.codex.jsonlines\\nprompts/60-composition-job-orchestration.md\\nprompts/96-compose-dev-and-prod-shapes.md\\nprompts/49-beat-sheet-refinement-ui-and-chat.md\\nprompts/93-accessibility-pass-and-keyboard-support.md\\nprompts/15-event-log-and-audit-trail.md\\nprompts/47-character-refinement-via-chat.md\\nprompts/16-asset-metadata-and-file-records.md\\nprompts/02-vite-react-scaffold.yolopilot.md\\nprompts/76-audio-preview-and-segment-status-ui.md\\nprompts/53-outline-drill-down.md\\nprompts/66-rewrite-prior-segments.md\\nprompts/18-postgres-job-runner-skeleton.md\\nprompts/43-brief-normalization-service.md\\nprompts/base_prompt.md\\nprompts/50-story-length-duration-and-chapter-setup.md\\nprompts/86-completed-session-summary-and-search.md\\nprompts/82-html-markdown-and-reader-formatting.md\\nprompts/77-final-audio-assembly.md\\nprompts/79-audio-pipeline-tests.md\\nprompts/34-ui-events-to-agent-context.md\\nprompts/89-full-journey-e2e-test.md\\nprompts/57-composition-prompt-assembly.md\\nprompts/39-bridge-and-replay-tests.md\\nprompts/03-fastapi-scaffold.md\\nprompts/31-intent-parser-service.md\\nprompts/75-audio-job-orchestration.md\\nprompts/02-vite-react-scaffold.yolopilot.jsonlines\\nprompts/00-project-charter.yolopilot.md\\nprompts/85-audio-player-with-text-sync-hooks.md\\nprompts/00-project-charter.summary.md\\nprompts/05-backend-settings-and-secrets-loading.md\\nprompts/33-action-echoes-in-chat.md\\nprompts/08-repo-quality-tooling.md\\nprompts/19-data-layer-integration-tests.md\\nprompts/73-gemini-tts-integration.md\\nprompts/71-audio-length-estimation.md\\nprompts/22-workspace-two-pane-layout.md\\nprompts/38-session-replay-and-resume-hydration.md\\nprompts/10-domain-model-and-state-machine.md\\nprompts/40-genre-selection-api-and-ui.md\\nprompts/70-audio-settings-model-and-ui.md\\nprompts/69-composition-loop-e2e-test.md\\nprompts/00-project-charter.yolopilot.jsonlines\\nprompts/27-reusable-form-and-card-components.md\\nprompts/98-demo-data-and-onboarding.md\\nprompts/21-past-sessions-home-screen.md\\nprompts/51-correlation-heuristics.md\\nprompts/35-chat-commands-and-quick-actions.md\\nprompts/55-continuity-bible.md\\nprompts/28-error-loading-and-feedback-states.md\\nprompts/32-ui-action-policy-engine.md\\nprompts/94-performance-pass.md\\nprompts/29-frontend-websocket-client-skeleton.md\\nprompts/58-usage-cost-and-latency-metrics.md\\nprompts/68-autosave-drafts-and-partials.md\\nprompts/09-initial-system-diagram-and-adr.md\\nprompts/91-rate-limits-retries-and-fallbacks.md\\nprompts/24-design-tokens-and-accessibility-foundation.md\\nprompts/84-reader-ui-with-navigation.md\\nprompts/59-planning-funnel-e2e-test.md\\nscripts/README.md\\nREADME.md\\ndocs/README.md\\ndocs/adr/README.md\\nbackend/README.md\\nbackend/requirements.txt\\nbackend/app/worker/README.md\\nbackend/migrations/README.md\\nfrontend/package.json\\nfrontend/README.md\\ntools/README.md\\ntools/webapp-qa/package.json\\ninfra/persistence/README.md\\ninfra/README.md\\ninfra/compose/docker-compose.yml\\ninfra/compose/README.md\\ntest-assets/README.md\\n\",\"exit_code\":0,\"status\":\"completed\"}}\nprompts/05-backend-settings-and-secrets-loading.yolopilot.md:839:    prompts/02-vite-react-scaffold.codex.jsonlines:22:{\"type\":\"item.completed\",\"item\":{\"id\":\"item_10\",\"type\":\"command_execution\",\"command\":\"/bin/zsh -lc \\\"sed -n '1,260p' prompts/base_prompt.md\\\"\",\"aggregated_output\":\"# Base Prompt — Build the Bedtime Story + Audio App\\n\\nYou are building a production-minded local-first application that helps a user create a bedtime story from idea to finished text and finished narration audio.\\n\\nThis prompt pack is designed to be used **sequentially**. Read this file first, then work through the numbered prompts in order. Each numbered prompt should be treated as an incremental implementation task inside the same repository. Preserve prior work unless the new prompt explicitly asks you to refactor it.\\n\\n## Product Summary\\n\\nThe product is a guided story-creation studio with a persistent session model. A user should be able to:\\n\\n1. See past story sessions first, including both in-progress and completed work.\\n2. Open a session to resume, edit, or finalize it.\\n3. Use a **two-pane workspace**:\\n   - **Left pane:** chat window, about one-third of the desktop width.\\n   - **Main pane:** structured workflow UI, about two-thirds of the desktop width.\\n4. Control the product in **both directions**:\\n   - The user can type in chat, and the system can translate those messages into UI actions.\\n   - The user can act directly in the UI, and those actions should be reflected in the chat log and in durable session state.\\n5. Move through a staged workflow:\\n   - Genre selection\\n   - Tone selection\\n   - Story setup / free-form brief\\n   - Story pitches\\n   - Character sheet\\n   - Save-the-Cat beat sheet\\n   - Story setup preferences such as word count, runtime, and chapters\\n   - Composition\\n   - Audio configuration and audio generation\\n   - Finalize / read / listen / download\\n6. Download the final story as a **Word document** and the final narration as an audio file.\\n7. Read or listen inside the product UI after generation is complete.\\n\\n## Story-Generation Philosophy\\n\\nThe app is for **bedtime stories**, not generic fiction generation. That means:\\n\\n- Wonder is welcome.\\n- Adventure is welcome.\\n- Mystery is welcome.\\n- Tension is allowed, but it should be modulated for bedtime use.\\n- Emotional repair matters.\\n- The ending should feel safe, satisfying, and restful.\\n- The narration and UI tone should remain calm, readable, and trustworthy.\\n\\nUse the research docs in this prompt pack as direct product input, especially the Save The Cat notes and the curated genre/tone catalog.\\n\\n## Required Story Workflow\\n\\nThe session should support this exact conceptual flow:\\n\\n1. **Genre Selection**\\n   - The user selects from the curated genre list.\\n2. **Tone Selection**\\n   - The user is shown preconfigured tone options for the chosen genre.\\n3. **Story Setup**\\n   - The user provides a free-form description of the story they want to tell.\\n4. **Story Pitches**\\n   - Gemini generates multiple candidate pitches.\\n   - The user can select one, ask for alternatives, or refine via chat.\\n5. **Character Sheet**\\n   - Gemini generates multiple candidate character sheets.\\n   - The user can select or refine via chat.\\n6. **Story Beats**\\n   - Gemini generates a Save-the-Cat beat sheet for the selected plan.\\n   - The user can refine the beats via chat or UI.\\n7. **Story Setup Preferences**\\n   - The user can set soft planning targets such as word count, read-aloud duration, and chapter organization.\\n   - These are **guides**, not strict constraints.\\n8. **Composition**\\n   - The system writes in segments.\\n   - The UI shows a live typewriter-like experience.\\n   - Writing should generally appear faster than the user can comfortably read.\\n   - A visible progress bar should show overall story progress.\\n   - The agent should periodically post chat summaries of what it is writing.\\n   - The user can interrupt and redirect composition, including causing rewrites of prior segments.\\n9. **Audio**\\n   - The user configures voice, music, speed, and related settings.\\n   - The system estimates final length heuristically.\\n   - Audio is generated in segments with visible progress.\\n10. **Finalize**\\n   - The user can read and listen in the UI.\\n   - The user can download the story as a Word document and the final audio as a file.\\n\\n## Non-Negotiable Technical Requirements\\n\\n### Frontend\\n- React\\n- Vite\\n- TypeScript\\n- The browser must **never** hold provider secrets\\n- Chat pane on the left, main pane on the right\\n- Past sessions screen must be the first meaningful screen\\n\\n### Backend\\n- Python\\n- FastAPI\\n- Durable backend-owned business logic\\n- Clear separation between route handlers, domain services, AI orchestration, and persistence\\n\\n### Data and Infrastructure\\n- PostgreSQL is the durable store for structured application state\\n- Use a **file-backed GCS emulator** for object/blob storage in local development\\n- The app must run with Docker Compose\\n- Postgres and object storage must both be **persistent across restarts**\\n- `secrets.yaml` exists locally for API keys and must **not** be committed to git\\n\\n### AI\\n- Use the **Gemini 3.1 family** for text/planning/composition workloads\\n- Keep model IDs centralized in config, not scattered through the codebase\\n- Put AI calls behind backend services and adapters\\n- Use structured outputs wherever determinism matters\\n- Use separate adapters for:\\n  - planning/classification/intent parsing\\n  - long-form story generation\\n  - narration / TTS\\n- Keep narration generation isolated behind a provider-style interface because model offerings evolve\\n\\n## Recommended Architecture\\n\\nUse a calm, maintainable architecture rather than a clever one.\\n\\n### Suggested application shape\\n- `frontend/` — React + Vite app\\n- `backend/` — FastAPI app plus domain services\\n- `infra/` — Docker Compose, Dockerfiles, local infrastructure helpers\\n- `docs/` — architecture notes, ADRs, product docs\\n\\n### Suggested backend layers\\n- `api/` or route handlers\\n- `settings/`\\n- `db/`\\n- `models/`\\n- `repositories/`\\n- `services/`\\n- `worker/`\\n- `ai/`\\n- `storage/`\\n\\n### Suggested durable concepts\\n- Session\\n- Workflow stage\\n- Event log\\n- Selected genre\\n- Selected tone\\n- Story brief\\n- Pitch batch + selected pitch\\n- Character batch + selected character sheet\\n- Beat sheet\\n- Story setup preferences\\n- Outline / chapter or scene plan\\n- Continuity bible\\n- Composition job\\n- Composition segment\\n- Audio job\\n- Asset record\\n\\n## Real-Time and Long-Running Work\\n\\nTreat composition and audio generation as **durable background jobs**, not request-thread work.\\n\\n- The browser should be able to refresh without losing the job.\\n- The UI should receive live progress updates.\\n- The backend should own current truth about progress.\\n- A separate worker process is strongly preferred.\\n- Use PostgreSQL-backed durable job records.\\n- Persist partial outputs frequently enough that resume is trustworthy.\\n\\n## Chat and UI Bridge Rules\\n\\nThe product must support true bidirectional interaction.\\n\\n### Chat-to-UI\\nA user message can propose actions like:\\n- select a tone\\n- regenerate pitches\\n- choose a pitch\\n- adjust character traits\\n- soften the midpoint\\n- shorten the story target\\n- pause writing\\n- change narration speed\\n\\n### UI-to-Chat\\nA direct UI action should appear in the chat history as a compact structured summary, for example:\\n- “Selected genre: Quest Fantasy”\\n- “Updated target runtime: ~12 minutes”\\n- “Accepted revised beat sheet”\\n\\n### Safety rule\\nThe model can **propose** actions, but a deterministic policy layer should decide whether they are valid in the current session state.\\n\\n## Save The Cat Expectations\\n\\nUse the Save The Cat method as the backbone of planning.\\n\\n- The beat sheet should be explicit, editable, and stored as structured data.\\n- The composition stage should write against the beat sheet and the detailed outline derived from it.\\n- Bedtime adaptation matters: the low points can be emotionally meaningful without becoming harsh or distressing.\\n- The final story should still feel like a transformation story, not just a string of nice scenes.\\n\\n## Genre and Tone Expectations\\n\\nUse the included research docs to seed:\\n- a curated genre list\\n- per-genre tone options\\n- bedtime-suitable arc notes\\n- tone descriptors that can guide UI copy and AI prompting\\n\\nDo **not** label tones with living or copyrighted-author names. Use generic tone labels and descriptors.\\n\\n## Audio Expectations\\n\\nNarration must be treated as a real product feature, not a side demo.\\n\\n- Segment audio generation so it is resumable\\n- Estimate length heuristically before generation\\n- Support voice selection\\n- Support speed controls\\n- Support optional background music\\n- Keep music subordinate to narration clarity\\n- Produce a final compiled audio artifact\\n- Keep intermediate and final artifacts trackable through durable metadata\\n\\n## Export Expectations\\n\\nAt minimum, the user must be able to get:\\n- final story text in the app\\n- final audio in the app\\n- downloadable `.docx`\\n- downloadable final audio file\\n\\n## Developer Experience and Quality Bar\\n\\nFavor:\\n- typed interfaces\\n- boring, explicit service boundaries\\n- migrations\\n- tests around durable state\\n- visible logs\\n- simple scripts for local dev\\n- useful docs\\n\\nAvoid:\\n- stuffing everything into route handlers\\n- leaking secrets to the browser\\n- relying on browser local state as the source of truth\\n- making stage transitions implicit or magical\\n- hiding important state in giant untyped JSON blobs when relational structure is obvious\\n\\n## How to Respond to Each Numbered Prompt\\n\\nFor each numbered prompt in this pack:\\n\\n1. Treat it as the next incremental repo task.\\n2. Preserve prior work unless the new prompt requires refactor.\\n3. Make reasonable local decisions when the prompt leaves room, but stay aligned with this base prompt.\\n4. Prefer small, coherent commits worth reviewing.\\n5. After implementing, report:\\n   - what you changed\\n   - key files touched\\n\",\"exit_code\":0,\"status\":\"completed\"}}\nprompts/05-backend-settings-and-secrets-loading.yolopilot.md:842:    prompts/02-vite-react-scaffold.codex.jsonlines:49:{\"type\":\"item.completed\",\"item\":{\"id\":\"item_25\",\"type\":\"command_execution\",\"command\":\"/bin/zsh -lc \\\"sed -n '1,260p' README.md\\\"\",\"aggregated_output\":\"# Storyteller\\n\\nStoryteller is a local-first, full-stack app for creating bedtime stories from first idea to finished text and finished narration audio. The product is session-based: the first meaningful screen is a past-sessions view where a user can resume work in progress, reopen a completed story, or start a new session.\\n\\nThis repository currently contains the first scaffold for that system. The project charter in this README and the supporting docs define the product and architecture that later prompts will implement.\\n\\n## Product Vision\\n\\nThe app should feel like a guided bedtime story studio, not a generic prompt box. A user should be able to:\\n\\n- See past sessions first and continue where they left off.\\n- Collaborate through both chat and direct UI controls.\\n- Move through a structured planning workflow before long-form writing starts.\\n- Watch story composition and audio generation progress in real time.\\n- Return later to read, listen, download, or revise completed work.\\n\\nThe tone of the product should stay calm, readable, and trustworthy. Wonder, mystery, and adventure are welcome, but bedtime suitability is a hard requirement: emotional stakes should resolve safely and the ending should feel restful.\\n\\n## Required Story Workflow\\n\\nThe application is being built around this ordered workflow:\\n\\n1. Genre selection\\n2. Tone selection\\n3. Story setup / free-form brief\\n4. Story pitches\\n5. Character sheet\\n6. Save-the-Cat beat sheet\\n7. Story setup preferences such as word count, runtime, and chapters\\n8. Composition\\n9. Audio configuration and audio generation\\n10. Finalize / read / listen / download\\n\\nEach stage must be durable, resumable, and editable. Chat messages can propose actions in the workflow, and direct UI actions must also be reflected back into the session chat log as compact summaries.\\n\\n## Fixed Technical Decisions\\n\\nThese choices are not optional for this project:\\n\\n- Frontend: React + Vite + TypeScript\\n- Backend: Python + FastAPI\\n- Structured data: PostgreSQL\\n- Blob storage: file-backed GCS emulator in local development\\n- Local orchestration: Docker Compose\\n- Secrets handling: local `secrets.yaml`, never committed to git\\n- AI access: Gemini 3.1 family behind backend-owned adapters and services\\n\\nTwo architectural rules follow from those constraints:\\n\\n- The browser must never hold provider secrets or call Gemini directly.\\n- Long-running story composition and narration generation must be durable background jobs with resumable server-side state.\\n\\nMore detail is in [docs/product-brief.md](/Users/kevin/code/storyteller/docs/product-brief.md) and [docs/architecture-overview.md](/Users/kevin/code/storyteller/docs/architecture-overview.md).\\n\\n## Local Development Expectations\\n\\nThe repo is intended to run locally with Docker Compose. At the current scaffold stage:\\n\\n- `frontend/` contains a Vite React app served on `http://localhost:8566`\\n- `backend/` contains a FastAPI app served on `http://localhost:8565`\\n- `infra/compose/` holds the canonical Compose file for local orchestration\\n- `tools/webapp-qa/` contains the browser automation container used for local UI verification\\n\\nStart the current stack with:\\n\\n```bash\\n./scripts/dev-compose.sh up --build\\n```\\n\\nThe current scaffold does not yet include PostgreSQL or the file-backed GCS emulator, but both are required parts of the target system and will be added through later prompt work. `secrets.yaml` is already gitignored and reserved for local-only credentials.\\n\\n## Repository Shape\\n\\n```text\\n.\\n├── backend/\\n│   ├── app/\\n│   │   ├── main.py\\n│   │   └── worker/\\n│   ├── migrations/\\n│   ├── Dockerfile\\n│   ├── README.md\\n│   └── requirements.txt\\n├── docs/\\n├── frontend/\\n├── infra/\\n│   ├── compose/\\n│   │   └── docker-compose.yml\\n│   └── persistence/\\n├── prompts/\\n├── scripts/\\n├── test-assets/\\n└── tools/\\n    └── webapp-qa/\\n```\\n\\n- `frontend/`: browser client and future TypeScript UI modules\\n- `backend/`: API code, worker home, and migration home\\n- `infra/`: Compose definitions and infrastructure notes\\n- `docs/`: product notes, architecture notes, and future ADRs\\n- `scripts/`: developer entrypoints such as `dev-compose.sh`\\n- `test-assets/`: reusable fixtures for UI, audio, and integration testing\\n- `prompts/`: sequential build prompts and task summaries\\n- `tools/`: local QA and developer tooling\\n\\n## What Success Looks Like\\n\\nA new engineer should be able to open this repository and quickly understand:\\n\\n- the first screen is the past-sessions home for resume, edit, and create flows\\n- the story workflow is staged and ordered\\n- the final product writes stories and generates narration audio durably\\n- the backend owns AI access, long-running jobs, and persistent state\\n\",\"exit_code\":0,\"status\":\"completed\"}}\nprompts/05-backend-settings-and-secrets-loading.yolopilot.md:845:    prompts/02-vite-react-scaffold.codex.jsonlines:72:{\"type\":\"item.completed\",\"item\":{\"id\":\"item_37\",\"type\":\"command_execution\",\"command\":\"/bin/zsh -lc \\\"sed -n '1,260p' docs/architecture-overview.md\\\"\",\"aggregated_output\":\"# Architecture Overview\\n\\n## System Picture\\n\\nStoryteller is a full-stack application with a browser client, a backend-owned workflow engine, durable relational state, durable object storage, and resumable background jobs.\\n\\n```text\\nReact + Vite client\\n        |\\n        v\\nFastAPI API layer\\n        |\\n        +--> domain services and policy layer\\n        |         |\\n        |         +--> AI adapters for planning, composition, and narration\\n        |         |\\n        |         +--> repositories for sessions, workflow state, jobs, and event log\\n        |\\n        +--> background workers for composition and audio generation\\n                  |\\n                  +--> PostgreSQL for durable structured state\\n                  +--> file-backed GCS emulator for artifacts and intermediate blobs\\n```\\n\\n## Why Gemini Calls Must Stay on the Backend\\n\\nAll Gemini access belongs on the server side for four reasons:\\n\\n1. Secrets control: provider credentials live in local `secrets.yaml` and must never enter the browser.\\n2. Policy enforcement: chat-to-UI actions and workflow transitions need deterministic server validation before the model can change session state.\\n3. Durable orchestration: prompts, structured outputs, retries, and model selection need to be coordinated with persistent session data and job records.\\n4. Provider flexibility: keeping Gemini behind backend adapters lets the app keep a stable internal interface while model IDs, structured output tactics, or narration providers evolve.\\n\\nThe frontend should only call the backend's API and subscribe to backend-owned progress events.\\n\\n## Why Composition and Audio Must Use Resumable Server-Side Jobs\\n\\nComposition and narration are long-running operations that cannot safely live inside request threads or browser memory. They need server-side jobs because:\\n\\n- a user must be able to refresh the page or return later without losing progress\\n- partial story text and audio segments need durable checkpoints\\n- progress updates need a single source of truth that both chat and UI can observe\\n- retries, cancellation, and resume logic need explicit job state rather than transient in-memory state\\n\\nThe durable model should include job records, segment records, asset metadata, and an event log that can reconstruct session progress after interruption.\\n\\n## Intended Backend Shape\\n\\nThe target backend should separate concerns explicitly:\\n\\n- `api/`: HTTP routes and websocket endpoints\\n- `settings/`: environment and secrets loading\\n- `db/`: database engine, migrations, and persistence setup\\n- `models/`: typed domain models and persistence schemas\\n- `repositories/`: database access for sessions, events, jobs, and assets\\n- `services/`: workflow logic and policy enforcement\\n- `ai/`: Gemini planning, composition, and narration adapters\\n- `worker/`: background job execution for writing and audio\\n- `storage/`: object storage abstraction over the local GCS emulator\\n\\n## Durable Domain Concepts\\n\\nThe system should persist the following concepts as first-class records:\\n\\n- Session\\n- Workflow stage\\n- Event log\\n- Selected genre\\n- Selected tone\\n- Story brief\\n- Pitch batch and selected pitch\\n- Character batch and selected character sheet\\n- Beat sheet\\n- Story setup preferences\\n- Outline or chapter plan\\n- Continuity bible\\n- Composition job and segments\\n- Audio job and segments\\n- Asset metadata\\n\\n## Current Repository State\\n\\nThe repository currently contains an initial scaffold:\\n\\n- `frontend/`: Vite React app\\n- `backend/`: FastAPI app\\n- `backend/migrations/`: reserved home for database schema history\\n- `backend/app/worker/`: reserved home for background job runners\\n- `infra/compose/docker-compose.yml`: local frontend, backend, and browser QA services\\n- `infra/persistence/`: notes for persistent local infrastructure data\\n- `scripts/dev-compose.sh`: convenience entrypoint for the Compose stack\\n- `tools/webapp-qa/`: containerized browser automation support\\n\\nPostgreSQL, the file-backed GCS emulator, background workers, and most domain layers are still planned work. This document records the required direction so later prompts can extend the scaffold without changing the architectural contract.\\n\",\"exit_code\":0,\"status\":\"completed\"}}\nprompts/05-backend-settings-and-secrets-loading.yolopilot.md:891:    DEFAULT_CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS = (\nprompts/05-backend-settings-and-secrets-loading.yolopilot.md:941:        gcs_bucket_name: str\nprompts/05-backend-settings-and-secrets-loading.yolopilot.md:966:                \"STORYTELLER_CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS\",\nprompts/05-backend-settings-and-secrets-loading.yolopilot.md:967:                DEFAULT_CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS,\nprompts/05-backend-settings-and-secrets-loading.yolopilot.md:970:            gcs_bucket_name=os.getenv(\"STORYTELLER_GCS_BUCKET_NAME\", \"\").strip(),\nprompts/05-backend-settings-and-secrets-loading.yolopilot.md:1038:    from fastapi.middleware.cors import CORSMiddleware\nprompts/05-backend-settings-and-secrets-loading.yolopilot.md:1084:            CORSMiddleware,\nprompts/05-backend-settings-and-secrets-loading.yolopilot.md:1145:        assert import Any\n\nfrom sqlalchemy import (\n    JSON,\n    Boolean,\n    DateTime,\n    ForeignKey,\n    Index,\n    Integer,\n    Numeric,\n    String,\n    Text,\n    UniqueConstraint,\n)\nfrom sqlalchemy import (\n    Enum as SQLAlchemyEnum,\n)\nfrom sqlalchemy.orm import Mapped, mapped_column, relationship\n\nfrom app.db.base import Base, TimestampMixin, UUIDPrimaryKeyMixin, utc_now\nfrom app.models.events import EventActorType\nfrom app.models.workflow import WorkflowStage, WorkflowStageState\n\n\ndef _enum_values(enum_cls: type[Enum]) -> list[str]:\n    return [member.value for member in enum_cls]\n\n\ndef build_enum(enum_cls: type[Enum], name: str) -> SQLAlchemyEnum:\n    return SQLAlchemyEnum(\n        enum_cls,\n        name=name,\n        native_enum=False,\n        values_callable=_enum_values,\n        validate_strings=True,\n    )\n\n\nclass JobStatus(str, Enum):\n    QUEUED = \"queued\"\n    IN_PROGRESS = \"in_progress\"\n    PAUSED = \"paused\"\n    COMPLETED = \"completed\"\n    FAILED = \"failed\"\n    CANCELLED = \"cancelled\"\n\n\nclass CompositionJobKind(str, Enum):\n    DRAFT = \"draft\"\n    REWRITE = \"rewrite\"\n\n\nclass AssetKind(str, Enum):\n    STORY_TEXT = \"story_text\"\n    STORY_DOCX = \"story_docx\"\n    AUDIO_SEGMENT = \"audio_segment\"\n    FINAL_AUDIO = \"final_audio\"\n\n\nclass AssetStatus(str, Enum):\n    PENDING = \"pending\"\n    READY = \"ready\"\n    FAILED = \"failed\"\n    SUPERSEDED = \"superseded\"\n\n\nWORKFLOW_STAGE_ENUM = build_enum(WorkflowStage, \"workflow_stage\")\nWORKFLOW_STAGE_STATE_ENUM = build_enum(WorkflowStageState, \"workflow_stage_state\")\nJOB_STATUS_ENUM = build_enum(JobStatus, \"job_status\")\nCOMPOSITION_JOB_KIND_ENUM = build_enum(CompositionJobKind, \"composition_job_kind\")\nASSET_KIND_ENUM = build_enum(AssetKind, \"asset_kind\")\nASSET_STATUS_ENUM = build_enum(AssetStatus, \"asset_status\")\nEVENT_ACTOR_TYPE_ENUM = build_enum(EventActorType, \"event_actor_type\")\n\n\nclass Genre(UUIDPrimaryKeyMixin, TimestampMixin, Base):\n    __tablename__ = \"genres\"\n\n    slug: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(80), nullable=False, unique=True)\n    label: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(120), nullable=False)\n    description: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(Text)\n    bedtime_safety_notes: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(Text)\n    arc_notes: Mapped[dict[str, Any] | list[Any] | None] = mapped_column(JSON)\n    sort_order: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(Integer, nullable=False, default=0)\n    is_active: Mapped[bool] = mapped_column(Boolean, nullable=False, default=True)\n\n    tone_profiles: Mapped[list[\"ToneProfile\"]] = relationship(\n        back_populates=\"genre\",\n        cascade=\"all, delete-orphan\",\n    )\n    sessions: Mapped[list[\"StorySession\"]] = relationship(back_populates=\"selected_genre\")\n\n    __table_args__ = (\n        Index(\"ix_genres_sort_order\", \"sort_order\"),\n        Index(\"ix_genres_is_active\", \"is_active\"),\n    )\n\n\nclass ToneProfile(UUIDPrimaryKeyMixin, TimestampMixin, Base):\n    __tablename__ = \"tone_profiles\"\n\n    genre_id: Mapped[str] = session=draft_session,\n            sequence_number=1,\n            actor_type=EventActorType.USER,\n            actor_id=\"local-user\",\n            event_type=\"accepted_story_setup\",\n WorkflowStageSnapshot(\n                    stage=WorkflowStage.GENRE,\n                    status=WorkflowStageState.COMPLETED,\n                    completed_at=now,\n session=draft_session,\n            pitch=pitch,\n            revision_number=1,\n            protagonist_name=\"Pip\",\n            summary=\"Pip is cautious, curious, and soothed by steady rhythms.\",\n            is_selected=True,\n            accepted_at=now,\n        )\n        beat_sheet = BeatSheet(\n            session=draft_session,\n            character_sheet=character_sheet,\n CompositionSegment(\n            session=draft_session,\n            composition_job=composition_job,\n            segment_index=2,\n            revision_number=1,\n            status=JobStatus.IN_PROGRESS,\n            planned_summary=\"Pip reaches the reeds and hears the lake settle.\",\n        )\n\n        completed_session = StorySession(\n            working_title=\"The Lantern Nest\",\n            current_stage=WorkflowStage.FINALIZE,\n            resume_stage=WorkflowStage.FINALIZE,\n            furthest_completed_stage=WorkflowStage.FINALIZE,\n EventActorType,\n    EventLogEntry,\n    ExportAsset,\n    Genre,\n    JobStatus,\n    Pitch,\n    StoryBrief,\n    StorySession,\n    StorySetup,\n    ToneProfile,\n    make_engine,\n)\nfrom app.models import WorkflowStage, WorkflowStageState\nfrom app.services.sessions import (\n    InvalidStageTransitionError,\n    SessionNotFoundError,\n    SessionService,\n)\nfrom sqlalchemy.orm import sessionmaker\n\n\ndef _enable_sqlite_foreign_keys(engine) -> None:\n    with engine.begin() as connection:\n        connection.exec_driver_sql(\"PRAGMA foreign_keys=ON\")\n\n\n@pytest.fixture\ndef db_session():\n    engine = make_engine(\"sqlite+pysqlite:///:memory:\")\n    _enable_sqlite_foreign_keys(engine)\n    Base.metadata.create_all(engine)\n    session = sessionmaker(bind=engine, autoflush=False, expire_on_commit=False)()\n\n    try:\n        yield session\n    finally:\n        session.close()\n        engine.dispose()\n\n\ndef test_create_session_initializes_stage_rows_and_ui_snapshot(db_session) -> None:\n    service = SessionService(db_session)\n\n    snapshot = service.create_session(working_title=\"  Starlight Ferry  \")\n\n    assert snapshot.display_title == \"Starlight Ferry\"\n    assert snapshot.working_title == \"Starlight Ferry\"\n    assert snapshot.current_stage == WorkflowStage.GENRE\n    assert snapshot.resume_stage == WorkflowStage.GENRE\n    assert snapshot.overall_status == WorkflowStageState.DRAFT\n    assert snapshot.progress.total_stages == len(WorkflowStage)\n    assert snapshot.progress.completed_stages == 0\n    assert [stage.stage for stage in snapshot.stage_states] == list(WorkflowStage)\n    assert all(stage.status == WorkflowStageState.DRAFT for stage in snapshot.stage_states)\n\n    stored_session = db_session.get(StorySession, snapshot.id)\n    assert stored_session is not None\n    assert len(stored_session.workflow_stage_states) == len(WorkflowStage)\n\n    event_rows = (\n        db_session.query(EventLogEntry)\n        .filter(EventLogEntry.session_id == snapshot.id)\n        .order_by(EventLogEntry.sequence_number.asc())\n        .all()\n    )\n    assert len(event_rows) == 1\n    assert event_rows[0].sequence_number == 1\n    assert event_rows[0].actor_type == EventActorType.USER\n    assert event_rows[0].event_type == \"session.created\"\n    assert event_rows[0].payload == {\n        \"schema_version\": 1,\n        \"working_title\": \"Starlight Ferry\",\n    }\n\n    history = service.load_session_history(snapshot.id)\n    assert history.latest_sequence_number == 1\n    assert len(history.events) == 1\n    assert history.events[0].summary == \"Created session: Starlight Ferry.\"\n    assert history.events[0].payload is not None\n    assert history.events[0].payload.working_title == \"Starlight Ferry\"\n\n\ndef test_load_session_snapshot_returns_selected_outputs_and_active_jobs(db_session) -> None:\n    now = datetime.now(timezone.utc)\n    genre = Genre(\n        slug=\"quest-fantasy\",\n        label=\"Quest Fantasy\",\n        description=\"A gentle adventure.\",\n    )\n    tone = ToneProfile(\n        genre=genre,\n        slug=\"hushed-wonder\",\n        label=\"Hushed Wonder\",\n        description=\"Quiet and luminous.\",\n        default_planning_hints={\"pacing\": \"unhurried\"},\n    )\n    story_session = StorySession(\n        working_title=None,\n        current_stage=WorkflowStage.COMPOSITION,\n        resume_stage=WorkflowStage.COMPOSITION,\n        furthest_completed_stage=WorkflowStage.STORY_SETUP,\n        overall_status=WorkflowStageState.IN_PROGRESS,\n        selected_genre=genre,\n        selected_tone_profile=tone,\n    )\n    db_session.add(story_session)\n    db_session.flush()\n\n    service = SessionService(db_session)\n    service.update_stage_state(\n        story_session.id,\n        stage=WorkflowStage.GENRE,\n        status=WorkflowStageState.COMPLETED,\n    )\n    service.update_stage_state(\n        story_session.id,\n        stage=WorkflowStage.TONE,\n        status=WorkflowStageState.COMPLETED,\n    )\n    service.update_stage_state(\n        story_session.id,\n        stage=WorkflowStage.BRIEF,\n        status=WorkflowStageState.COMPLETED,\n    )\n    service.update_stage_state(\n        story_session.id,\n        stage=WorkflowStage.PITCHES,\n        status=WorkflowStageState.COMPLETED,\n    )\n    service.update_stage_state(\n        story_session.id,\n        stage=WorkflowStage.CHARACTERS,\n        status=WorkflowStageState.COMPLETED,\n    )\n    service.update_stage_state(\n        story_session.id,\n        stage=WorkflowStage.BEATS,\n        status=WorkflowStageState.COMPLETED,\n    )\n    service.update_stage_state(\n        story_session.id,\n        stage=WorkflowStage.STORY_SETUP,\n        status=WorkflowStageState.COMPLETED,\n    )\n    service.update_stage_state(\n        story_session.id,\n        stage=WorkflowStage.COMPOSITION,\n        status=WorkflowStageState.IN_PROGRESS,\n        detail=\"Writing the middle chapters.\",\n    )\n\n    brief = StoryBrief(\n        session_id=story_session.id,\n        revision_number=1,\n        raw_brief=\"A young fox rows across a moonlit lake.\",\n        normalized_summary=\"A sleepy quest to find a glowing reed before dawn.\",\n        planning_notes=\"Keep the tension soft and quickly reparative.\",\n        is_active=True,\n        accepted_at=now,\n    )\n    db_session.add(brief)\n    db_session.flush()\n\n    pitch = Pitch(\n        session_id=story_session.id,\n        story_brief_id=brief.id,\n        generation_key=\"pitch-batch-1\",\n        pitch_index=0,\n        title=\"The Reed of Quiet Light\",\n        logline=\"A young fox follows the lake's hush toward a night mystery.\",\n        summary=\"Pip drifts toward a lantern-bright reed and learns the lake is helping.\",\n        bedtime_notes=\"Every surprise resolves gently.\",\n        is_selected=True,\n        accepted_at=now,\n    )\n    db_session.add(pitch)\n    db_session.flush()\n\n    character_sheet = CharacterSheet(\n        session_id=story_session.id,\n        pitch_id=pitch.id,\n        revision_number=1,\n        title=\"Pip and the Listening Lake\",\n        protagonist_name=\"Pip\",\n        summary=\"Pip is cautious, curious, and calmed by steady rhythms.\",\n        supporting_cast={\"friend\": \"a sleepy reed-heron\"},\n        bedtime_notes=\"Keep Pip emotionally safe in every scene.\",\n        is_selected=True,\n        accepted_at=now,\n    )\n    db_session.add(character_sheet)\n    db_session.flush()\n\n    beat_sheet = BeatSheet(\n        session_id=story_session.id,\n        character_sheet_id=character_sheet.id,\n        revision_number=1,\n        summary=\"A gentle Save-the-Cat arc with a quiet return home.\",\n        beats={\"opening_image\": \"Moonlight on still water\"},\n        bedtime_notes=\"The midpoint should feel magical, not scary.\",\n        is_selected=True,\n        accepted_at=now,\n    )\n    db_session.add(beat_sheet)\n    db_session.flush()\n\n    story_setup = StorySetup(\n        session_id=story_session.id,\n        beat_sheet_id=beat_sheet.id,\n        revision_number=1,\n WORKFLOW_STAGE_SEQUENCE\n        if stage_state_map.get(stage, None)\n        and stage_state_map[stage].status == WorkflowStageState.NEEDS_REGENERATION\n    )\n    return SessionProgress(\n  )\n\n\ndef _build_stage_state_views(stage_states) -> list[SessionStageStateView]:\n    stage_state_map = {stage_state.stage: stage_state for stage_state in stage_states}\n    views:                 snapshot.last_event.created_at if snapshot and snapshot.last_event else None\n                ),\n            )\n        )\n\n    return views\n\n\ndef _build_story_brief_view(row: StoryBrief | None) -> StoryBriefView | None:\n    if row is None:\n        return None\n\n    return StoryBriefView(\n        id=row.id,\n        revision_number=row.revision_number,\n PitchView | None:\n    if row is None:\n        return None\n\n    return PitchView(\n        id=row.id,\n        generation_key=row.generation_key,\n        pitch_index=row.pitch_index,\n _build_character_sheet_view(row: CharacterSheet | None) -> CharacterSheetView | None:\n    if row is None:\n        return None\n\n    return CharacterSheetView(\n        id=row.id,\n       revision_number=row.revision_number,\n        target_word_count=row.target_word_count,\n        target_runtime_minutes=row.target_runtime_minutes,\n        chapter_count=row.chapter_count,\n _build_composition_job_view(row: CompositionJob | None) -> CompositionJobView | None:\n    if row is None:\n        return None\n\n    return CompositionJobView(\n        id=row.id,\n        job_kind=row.job_kind,\n        status=row.status,\n        progress_percent=row.progress_percent,\n        current_segment_index=row.current_segment_index,\n        attempt_count=row.attempt_count,\n        stop_reason=row.stop_reason,\n        error_message=row.error_message,\n        started_at=row.started_at,\n        completed_at=row.completed_at,\n        created_at=row.created_at,\n id=row.id,\n        status=row.status,\n        voice_key=row.voice_key,\n        playback_speed=row.playback_speed,\n        include_background_music=row.include_background_music,\n        music_profile=row.music_profile,\n        estimated_duration_seconds=row.estimated_duration_seconds,\n        current_segment_index=row.current_segment_index,\n created_at=row.created_at,\n        updated_at=row.updated_at,\n    )\n\n\ndef _build_export_asset_view(row: ExportAsset | None) -> ExportAssetView | None:\n    if row is None:\n        return None\n\n    return ExportAssetView(\n        id=row.id,\n        asset_kind=row.asset_kind,\n        status=row.status,\n        mime_type=row.mime_type,\n        byte_size=row.byte_size,\n        ready_at=row.ready_at,\n        created_at=row.created_at,\n        updated_at=row.updated_at,\n    )\n\n\ndef _resolve_display_title(\n    *,\n    working_title: str | None,\n    pitch_title: str | None = None,\n    normalized_summary: str | None = None,\n    raw_brief: str | None = None,\n) -> str:\n    for candidate in (working_title, pitch_title, normalized_summary, raw_brief):\n        normalized = _normalize_optional_text(candidate)\n        if normalized:\n            return normalized[:120]\n\n    return \"Untitled bedtime story\"\n\n\ndef _normalize_optional_text(value: str | None) -> str | None:\n    if value is None:\n        return None\n\n    normalized = value.strip()\n    return normalized or None\n\n\ndef _resolve_overall_status(\n    stage_states: Mapping[WorkflowStage, WorkflowStageState],\n) -> WorkflowStageState:\n    statuses = tuple(stage_states.values())\n    if any(status == WorkflowStageState.NEEDS_REGENERATION for status in statuses):\n        return WorkflowStageState.NEEDS_REGENERATION\n    if stage_states.get(WorkflowStage.FINALIZE) == WorkflowStageState.COMPLETED:\n        return WorkflowStageState.COMPLETED\n    if any(status == WorkflowStageState.IN_PROGRESS for status in statuses):\n        return WorkflowStageState.IN_PROGRESS\n    if any(status == WorkflowStageState.COMPLETED for status in statuses):\n        return WorkflowStageState.IN_PROGRESS\n    return WorkflowStageState.DRAFT\n\n\ndef _resolve_furthest_completed_stage(\n    stage_states: Mapping[WorkflowStage, WorkflowStageState],\n) -> \"sed -n '1,220p' backend/migrations/versions/20260331_01_initial_storyteller_schema.py\"", "raw_event": {"item": {"aggregated_output": "\"\"\"create the initial storyteller relational schema\n\nRevision ID: 20260331_01\nRevises:\nCreate Date: 2026-03-31 22:30:00.000000\n\"\"\"\n\nfrom __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom alembic import op\nimport sqlalchemy as sa\n\n\n# revision identifiers, used by Alembic.\nrevision = \"20260331_01\"\ndown_revision = None\nbranch_labels = None\ndepends_on = None\n\n\nWORKFLOW_STAGE_VALUES = (\n    \"genre\",\n    \"tone\",\n    \"brief\",\n    \"pitches\",\n    \"characters\",\n    \"beats\",\n    \"story_setup\",\n    \"composition\",\n    \"audio\",\n    \"finalize\",\n)\nWORKFLOW_STAGE_STATE_VALUES = (\n    \"draft\",\n    \"in_progress\",\n    \"completed\",\n    \"needs_regeneration\",\n)\nJOB_STATUS_VALUES = (\n    \"queued\",\n    \"in_progress\",\n    \"paused\",\n    \"completed\",\n    \"failed\",\n    \"cancelled\",\n)\nCOMPOSITION_JOB_KIND_VALUES = (\"draft\", \"rewrite\")\nASSET_KIND_VALUES = (\"story_text\", \"story_docx\", \"audio_segment\", \"final_audio\")\nASSET_STATUS_VALUES = (\"pending\", \"ready\", \"failed\", \"superseded\")\nEVENT_ACTOR_TYPE_VALUES = (\"user\", \"assistant\", \"system\", \"service\")\n\n\ndef workflow_stage_enum() -> sa.Enum:\n    return sa.Enum(*WORKFLOW_STAGE_VALUES, name=\"workflow_stage\", native_enum=False)\n\n\ndef workflow_stage_state_enum() -> sa.Enum:\n    return sa.Enum(\n        *WORKFLOW_STAGE_STATE_VALUES,\n        name=\"workflow_stage_state\",\n        native_enum=False,\n    )\n\n\ndef job_status_enum() -> sa.Enum:\n    return sa.Enum(*JOB_STATUS_VALUES, name=\"job_status\", native_enum=False)\n\n\ndef composition_job_kind_enum() -> sa.Enum:\n    return sa.Enum(\n        *COMPOSITION_JOB_KIND_VALUES,\n        name=\"composition_job_kind\",\n        native_enum=False,\n    )\n\n\ndef asset_kind_enum() -> sa.Enum:\n    return sa.Enum(*ASSET_KIND_VALUES, name=\"asset_kind\", native_enum=False)\n\n\ndef asset_status_enum() -> sa.Enum:\n    return sa.Enum(*ASSET_STATUS_VALUES, name=\"asset_status\", native_enum=False)\n\n\ndef event_actor_type_enum() -> sa.Enum:\n    return sa.Enum(*EVENT_ACTOR_TYPE_VALUES, name=\"event_actor_type\", native_enum=False)\n\n\ndef timestamp_column(name: str, *, nullable: bool = False) -> sa.Column:\n    return sa.Column(\n        name,\n        sa.DateTime(timezone=True),\n        nullable=nullable,\n        server_default=sa.text(\"CURRENT_TIMESTAMP\") if not nullable else None,\n    )\n\n\ndef upgrade() -> None:\n    op.create_table(\n        \"genres\",\n        sa.Column(\"id\", sa.String(length=36), nullable=False),\n        sa.Column(\"slug\", sa.String(length=80), nullable=False),\n        sa.Column(\"label\", sa.String(length=120), nullable=False),\n        sa.Column(\"description\", sa.Integer(), nullable=False, server_default=\"0\"),\n        sa.Column(\"is_active\", sa.Boolean(), nullable=False, server_default=sa.true()),\n        timestamp_column(\"created_at\"),\n        timestamp_column(\"updated_at\"),\n        sa.PrimaryKeyConstraint(\"id\", name=\"pk_genres\"),\n        sa.UniqueConstraint(\"slug\", name=\"uq_genres_slug\"),\n    )\n    op.create_index(\"ix_genres_sort_order\", \"genres\", [\"sort_order\"], unique=False)\n    op.create_index(\"ix_genres_is_active\", \"genres\", [\"is_active\"], unique=False)\n\n    op.create_table(\n        \"tone_profiles\",\n        sa.Column(\"id\", sa.String(length=36), nullable=False),\n        sa.Column(\"genre_id\", sa.String(length=36), nullable=False),\n        sa.Column(\"slug\", sa.Column(\"bedtime_notes\", sa.Text(), nullable=True),\n        sa.Column(\"descriptors\", sa.JSON(), nullable=True),\n        sa.Column(\"sort_order\", sa.Integer(), nullable=False, ondelete=\"CASCADE\",\n        ),\n        sa.PrimaryKeyConstraint(\"id\", name=\"pk_tone_profiles\"),\n        sa.UniqueConstraint(\"genre_id\", \"slug\", name=\"uq_tone_profiles_genre_id_slug\"),\n       \"ix_tone_profiles_genre_id_is_active\",\n        \"tone_profiles\",\n        [\"genre_id\", \"is_active\"],\n        unique=False,\n    )\n\n    op.create_table(\n        \"story_sessions\",\n \"sed -n '1,220p' backend/app/services/event_log.py\"", "raw_event": {"item": {"aggregated_output": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom collections.abc import Mapping, Sequence\nfrom enum import Enum\nfrom typing import Any\n\nfrom sqlalchemy.orm import Session\n\nfrom app.db import EventActorType, EventLogEntry\nfrom app.models import WorkflowStage, WorkflowStageState\nfrom app.models.events import (\n    AIOutputKind,\n    AIOutputRecordedEventPayload,\n    AudioProgressEventPayload,\n    ChatMessageRecordedEventPayload,\n    ChatMessageRole,\n    CompositionProgressEventPayload,\n    EventPayload,\n    SelectionKind,\n    SelectionRecordedEventPayload,\n    SessionCreatedEventPayload,\n    SessionEventActor,\n    SessionEventType,\n    SessionEventView,\n    SessionHistoryView,\n    UIActionRecordedEventPayload,\n    UserEditRecordedEventPayload,\n    UserEditTargetKind,\n    WorkflowStageChangedEventPayload,\n    parse_event_payload,\n    serialize_event_payload,\n)\nfrom app.repositories import EventLogRepository\n\nDEFAULT_LOCAL_USER_ACTOR = SessionEventActor(\n    actor_type=EventActorType.USER,\n    actor_id=\"local-user\",\n)\nDEFAULT_ASSISTANT_ACTOR = SessionEventActor(\n    actor_type=EventActorType.ASSISTANT,\n    actor_id=\"story-planner\",\n)\nDEFAULT_SYSTEM_ACTOR = SessionEventActor(\n    actor_type=EventActorType.SYSTEM,\n    actor_id=\"worker\",\n)\n\n\nclass SessionEventLogService:\n    def __init__(self, session: Session):\n        self._events = EventLogRepository(session)\n\n    def append_event(\n        self,\n        session_id: str,\n        *,\n        actor: SessionEventActor,\n        event_type: SessionEventType | str,\n        summary: str,\n        payload: EventPayload | Mapping[str, Any] | None = None,\n        stage: WorkflowStage | None = None,\n    ) -> EventLogEntry:\n        normalized_summary = summary.strip()\n        if not normalized_summary:\n            raise ValueError(\"event summary must not be empty\")\n\n        return self._events.append(\n            session_id=session_id,\n            actor_type=actor.actor_type,\n            actor_id=actor.actor_id,\n            event_type=_enum_value(event_type),\n            summary=normalized_summary,\n            payload=serialize_event_payload(payload),\n            stage=stage,\n        )\n\n    def list_session_history(\n        self,\n        session_id: str,\n        *,\n        limit: int | None = None,\n        after_sequence_number: int | None = None,\n    ) -> SessionHistoryView:\n        rows = self._events.list_for_session(\n            session_id,\n            limit=limit,\n            after_sequence_number=after_sequence_number,\n        )\n        latest_sequence_number = self._events.get_latest_sequence_number(session_id)\n        return SessionHistoryView(\n            session_id=session_id,\n            latest_sequence_number=latest_sequence_number,\n            events=[_build_session_event_view(row) for row in rows],\n        )\n\n    def record_session_created(\n        self,\n        session_id: str,\n        *,\n        working_title: str | None,\n        actor: SessionEventActor | None = None,\n    ) -> EventLogEntry:\n        title = working_title or \"Untitled bedtime story\"\n        return self.append_event(\n            session_id,\n            actor=actor or DEFAULT_LOCAL_USER_ACTOR,\n            event_type=SessionEventType.SESSION_CREATED,\n            summary=f\"Created session: {title}.\",\n            payload=SessionCreatedEventPayload(working_title=working_title),\n        )\n\n    def record_stage_state_changed(\n        self,\n        session_id: str,\n        *,\n        stage: WorkflowStage,\n        previous_status: WorkflowStageState,\n        status: WorkflowStageState,\n        detail: str | None,\n        invalidated_stages: Sequence[WorkflowStage],\n        current_stage: WorkflowStage,\n        resume_stage: WorkflowStage,\n        furthest_completed_stage: WorkflowStage | None,\n        overall_status: WorkflowStageState,\n        actor: SessionEventActor | None = None,\n    ) -> EventLogEntry:\n        invalidated = list(invalidated_stages)\n        if invalidated:\n            invalidated_summary = \", \".join(stage_id.value for stage_id in invalidated)\n            summary = (\n                f\"Updated {stage.value} stage to {status.value} and invalidated \"\n                f\"{invalidated_summary}.\"\n            )\n        else:\n            summary = f\"Updated {stage.value} stage to {status.value}.\"\n\n        return self.append_event(\n            session_id,\n            actor=actor or DEFAULT_LOCAL_USER_ACTOR,\n            event_type=SessionEventType.WORKFLOW_STAGE_CHANGED,\n            summary=summary,\n            stage=stage,\n            payload=WorkflowStageChangedEventPayload(\n                previous_status=previous_status,\n                status=status,\n                detail=detail,\n                invalidated_stages=invalidated,\n                current_stage=current_stage,\n                resume_stage=resume_stage,\n                furthest_completed_stage=furthest_completed_stage,\n                overall_status=overall_status,\n            ),\n        )\n\n    def record_selection(\n        self,\n        session_id: str,\n        *,\n        selection_kind: SelectionKind,\n        stage: WorkflowStage | None,\n        label: str | None = None,\n        selection_id: str | None = None,\n        slug: str | None = None,\n        previous_selection_id: str | None = None,\n        source: str = \"ui\",\n        accepted: bool = True,\n        actor: SessionEventActor | None = None,\n    ) -> EventLogEntry:\n        selection_label = label or slug or selection_id or selection_kind.value\n        action = \"Selected\" if accepted else \"Recorded candidate\"\n        return self.append_event(\n            session_id,\n            actor=actor or DEFAULT_LOCAL_USER_ACTOR,\n            event_type=SessionEventType.SELECTION_RECORDED,\n            summary=f\"{action} {selection_kind.value.replace('_', ' ')}: {selection_label}.\",\n            stage=stage,\n            payload=SelectionRecordedEventPayload(\n                selection_kind=selection_kind,\n                selection_id=selection_id,\n                slug=slug,\n                label=label,\n                previous_selection_id=previous_selection_id,\n                source=source,\n                accepted=accepted,\n            ),\n        )\n\n    def record_ai_output(\n        self,\n        session_id: str,\n        *,\n        output_kind: AIOutputKind,\n        stage: WorkflowStage | None,\n        resource_id: str | None = None,\n        generation_key: str | None = None,\n        candidate_count: int | None = None,\n        model_id: str | None = None,\n        summary_text: str | None = None,\n        actor: SessionEventActor | None = None,\n    ) -> EventLogEntry:\n        return self.append_event(\n            session_id,\n            actor=actor or DEFAULT_ASSISTANT_ACTOR,\n            event_type=SessionEventType.AI_OUTPUT_RECORDED,\n            summary=f\"Recorded AI output for {output_kind.value}.\",\n            stage=stage,\n            payload=AIOutputRecordedEventPayload(\n                output_kind=output_kind,\n                resource_id=resource_id,\n                generation_key=generation_key,\n                candidate_count=candidate_count,\n                model_id=model_id,\n                summary=summary_text,\n            ),\n        )\n\n    def record_user_edit(\n        self,\n        session_id: str,\n        *,\n", "command": "/bin/zsh -lc \"sed -n '220,420p' backend/tests/test_session_service.py\"", "raw_event": {"item": {"aggregated_output": "\n    story_setup = StorySetup(\n        session_id=story_session.id,\n        beat_sheet_id=beat_sheet.id,\n        revision_number=1,\n        target_word_count=1800,\n        target_runtime_minutes=12,\n        chapter_count=3,\n        chapter_style=\"three gentle chapters\",\n        guidance_notes=\"Let each chapter end on a calmer image than it began.\",\n        preferences={\"narration_style\": \"soft\"},\n        is_selected=True,\n        accepted_at=now,\n    )\n    db_session.add(story_setup)\n    db_session.flush()\n\n    composition_job = CompositionJob(\n        session_id=story_session.id,\n        beat_sheet_id=beat_sheet.id,\n        story_setup_id=story_setup.id,\n        job_kind=CompositionJobKind.DRAFT,\n        status=JobStatus.IN_PROGRESS,\n        progress_percent=48.0,\n        current_segment_index=2,\n    )\n    db_session.add(composition_job)\n    db_session.flush()\n\n    audio_job = AudioJob(\n        session_id=story_session.id,\n        source_composition_job_id=composition_job.id,\n        status=JobStatus.PAUSED,\n        voice_key=\"gemini-soft-1\",\n        playback_speed=0.95,\n        include_background_music=True,\n        music_profile=\"gentle-piano\",\n        estimated_duration_seconds=620,\n    )\n    db_session.add(audio_job)\n\n    story_asset = ExportAsset(\n        session_id=story_session.id,\n        composition_job_id=composition_job.id,\n        asset_kind=AssetKind.STORY_TEXT,\n        status=AssetStatus.READY,\n        storage_bucket=\"storyteller-exports\",\n        storage_key=\"sessions/story-1/story.md\",\n        mime_type=\"text/markdown\",\n        byte_size=4096,\n        ready_at=now,\n    )\n    audio_asset = ExportAsset(\n        session_id=story_session.id,\n        audio_job_id=audio_job.id,\n        asset_kind=AssetKind.FINAL_AUDIO,\n        status=AssetStatus.READY,\n        storage_bucket=\"storyteller-exports\",\n        storage_key=\"sessions/story-1/story.mp3\",\n        mime_type=\"audio/mpeg\",\n        byte_size=8192,\n        ready_at=now,\n    )\n    db_session.add_all([story_asset, audio_asset])\n    db_session.commit()\n\n    snapshot = service.load_session_snapshot(story_session.id)\n\n    assert snapshot.display_title == \"The Reed of Quiet Light\"\n    assert snapshot.selected_genre is not None and snapshot.selected_genre.slug == \"quest-fantasy\"\n    assert snapshot.selected_tone_profile is not None\n    assert snapshot.story_brief is not None\n    assert snapshot.story_brief.raw_brief.startswith(\"A young fox\")\n    assert snapshot.selected_pitch is not None\n    assert snapshot.selected_pitch.title == \"The Reed of Quiet Light\"\n    assert snapshot.selected_character_sheet is not None\n    assert snapshot.selected_beat_sheet is not None\n    assert snapshot.selected_story_setup is not None\n    assert snapshot.active_composition_job is not None\n    assert snapshot.active_audio_job is not None\n    assert snapshot.latest_story_asset is not None\n    assert snapshot.latest_audio_asset is not None\n    assert snapshot.progress.completed_stages == 7\n    assert snapshot.progress.in_progress_stages == 1\n    assert snapshot.current_stage == WorkflowStage.COMPOSITION\n    composition_stage = next(\n        stage\n        for stage in snapshot.stage_states\n        if stage.stage == WorkflowStage.COMPOSITION\n    )\n    assert composition_stage.detail == \"Writing the middle chapters.\"\n\n\ndef test_update_stage_state_rejects_skipping_prerequisites(db_session) -> None:\n    service = SessionService(db_session)\n    snapshot = service.create_session(working_title=\"Stage Guardrails\")\n\n    with pytest.raises(InvalidStageTransitionError):\n        service.update_stage_state(\n            snapshot.id,\n            stage=WorkflowStage.TONE,\n            status=WorkflowStageState.COMPLETED,\n        )\n\n\ndef test_update_stage_state_records_event_history_and_stage_last_event(db_session) -> None:\n    service = SessionService(db_session)\n    snapshot = service.create_session(working_title=\"Timeline Check\")\n\n    snapshot = service.update_stage_state(\n        snapshot.id,\n        stage=WorkflowStage.GENRE,\n        status=WorkflowStageState.COMPLETED,\n        detail=\"Accepted quest fantasy.\",\n    )\n\n    history = service.load_session_history(snapshot.id)\n    assert [event.event_type for event in history.events] == [\n        \"session.created\",\n        \"workflow.stage_changed\",\n    ]\n    assert history.latest_sequence_number == 2\n\n    stage_event = history.events[-1]\n    assert stage_event.stage == WorkflowStage.GENRE\n    assert stage_event.payload is not None\n    assert stage_event.payload.previous_status == WorkflowStageState.DRAFT\n    assert stage_event.payload.status == WorkflowStageState.COMPLETED\n    assert stage_event.payload.detail == \"Accepted quest fantasy.\"\n    assert stage_event.payload.invalidated_stages == []\n    assert stage_event.payload.resume_stage == WorkflowStage.TONE\n\n    genre_stage = next(\n        stage for stage in snapshot.stage_states if stage.stage == WorkflowStage.GENRE\n    )\n    assert genre_stage.last_event_type == \"workflow.stage_changed\"\n    assert genre_stage.last_event_summary == \"Updated genre stage to completed.\"\n\n\ndef test_update_stage_state_invalidates_downstream_outputs_after_upstream_edit(db_session) -> None:\n    service = SessionService(db_session)\n    snapshot = service.create_session(working_title=\"Regeneration Test\")\n\n    for stage in (\n        WorkflowStage.GENRE,\n        WorkflowStage.TONE,\n        WorkflowStage.BRIEF,\n        WorkflowStage.PITCHES,\n        WorkflowStage.CHARACTERS,\n        WorkflowStage.BEATS,\n        WorkflowStage.STORY_SETUP,\n        WorkflowStage.COMPOSITION,\n        WorkflowStage.AUDIO,\n        WorkflowStage.FINALIZE,\n    ):\n        snapshot = service.update_stage_state(\n            snapshot.id,\n            stage=stage,\n            status=WorkflowStageState.COMPLETED,\n            detail=f\"Accepted {stage.value}.\",\n        )\n\n    assert snapshot.overall_status == WorkflowStageState.COMPLETED\n    assert snapshot.resume_stage == WorkflowStage.FINALIZE\n\n    snapshot = service.update_stage_state(\n        snapshot.id,\n        stage=WorkflowStage.BRIEF,\n        status=WorkflowStageState.COMPLETED,\n        detail=\"Accepted a revised brief.\",\n    )\n\n    stage_map = {stage.stage: stage for stage in snapshot.stage_states}\n    assert snapshot.current_stage == WorkflowStage.PITCHES\n    assert snapshot.resume_stage == WorkflowStage.PITCHES\n    assert snapshot.furthest_completed_stage == WorkflowStage.STORY_SETUP\n    assert snapshot.overall_status == WorkflowStageState.NEEDS_REGENERATION\n    assert snapshot.completed_at is None\n    assert stage_map[WorkflowStage.BRIEF].status == WorkflowStageState.COMPLETED\n    assert stage_map[WorkflowStage.PITCHES].status == WorkflowStageState.NEEDS_REGENERATION\n    assert stage_map[WorkflowStage.STORY_SETUP].status == WorkflowStageState.COMPLETED\n    assert stage_map[WorkflowStage.COMPOSITION].status == WorkflowStageState.NEEDS_REGENERATION\n    assert stage_map[WorkflowStage.FINALIZE].status == WorkflowStageState.NEEDS_REGENERATION\n    assert stage_map[WorkflowStage.PITCHES].detail == \"Accepted a revised brief.\"\n    assert stage_map[WorkflowStage.PITCHES].last_event_type == \"workflow.stage_changed\"\n    assert \"invalidated pitches\" in stage_map[WorkflowStage.BRIEF].last_event_summary\n    assert \"invalidated pitches\" in stage_map[WorkflowStage.PITCHES].last_event_summary\n\n\ndef test_list_recent_sessions_returns_latest_first_with_progress_counts(db_session) -> None:\n    service = SessionService(db_session)\n    older = service.create_session(working_title=\"Older Session\")\n    newer = service.create_session(working_title=\"Newer Session\")\n\n    older_row = db_session.get(StorySession, older.id)\n    newer_row = db_session.get(StorySession, newer.id)\n    assert older_row is not None and newer_row is not None\n\n    older_row.updated_at = datetime.now(timezone.utc) - timedelta(days=1)\n    newer_row.updated_at = datetime.now(timezone.utc)\n    db_session.commit()\n", "command": "/bin/zsh -lc \"sed -n '220,420p' backend/tests/test_session_service.py\"", "exit_code": 0, "id": "item_21", "status": "completed", "type": "command_execution"}, "type": "item.completed"}, "task_display_context": {"event_number": 46, "prompt_index": 17, "prompt_name": "16 \u2014 Asset Metadata and File Records", "prompt_total": 100}, "timestap": "2026-03-31T23:55:15-07:00"}

relationship(back_populates=\"story_setups\")\n    beat_sheet: Mapped[\"BeatSheet | None\"] = relationship(back_populates=\"story_setups\")\n    composition_jobs: Mapped[list[\"CompositionJob\"]] = CompositionJob(UUIDPrimaryKeyMixin, TimestampMixin, Base):\n    __tablename__ = \"composition_jobs\"\n\n    session_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(\n        String(36),\n mapped_column(Integer, nullable=False, default=1)\n    stop_reason: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(255))\n    error_message: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(Text)\n    metadata_json: mapped_column(DateTime(timezone=True))\n\n    session: Mapped[\"StorySession\"] = relationship(back_populates=\"composition_jobs\")\n    beat_sheet: Mapped[\"BeatSheet | None\"] = Mapped[\"CompositionSegment | None\"] = relationship(\n        remote_side=\"CompositionSegment.id\"\n    )\n\n    __table_args__ = (\n        UniqueConstraint(\n            \"composition_job_id\",\n mapped_column(\n        Numeric(4, 2, asdecimal=False),\n        nullable=False,\n        default=1.0,\n    )\n    include_background_music: Mapped[bool] = mapped_column(Boolean, nullable=False,     prompts/16-asset-metadata-and-file-records.yolopilot.jsonlines:65:{"color": "cyan", "emoji": "\ud83d\udee0\ufe0f", "event_type": "Command Finished", "message": "completed, exit 0: /bin/zsh -lc \"sed -n '1,220p' docs/domain-model.md\"", "raw_event": {"item": {"aggregated_output": "# Domain Model and Session State Machine\n\nThis document defines the durable business objects and workflow rules for a single story-creation session. The goal is to give the backend, frontend, migrations, and later AI orchestration code one shared contract for how a session progresses, pauses, rewinds, and resumes.\n\n## Core Modeling Rules\n\n- The `story_session` is the durable unit of work.\n- Workflow truth lives on the backend, not in browser-only UI state.\n- Every workflow stage is tracked explicitly, even when later stages are generated from earlier ones.\n- Backward edits are allowed on purpose and must mark downstream outputs stale instead of silently pretending they are still current.\n- Composition and audio are long-running workflows backed by durable records, not one-shot request responses.\n- Event history is append-only and explains how the current snapshot was reached.\n\n## Session Snapshot Contract\n\nThe session snapshot returned to the UI should eventually include these fields, even if some land in later prompts:\n\n| Field | Purpose |\n| --- | --- |\n| `id` | Stable UUID for the story session. |\n| `working_title` | Best current human-readable label for lists and search. |\n| `current_stage` | Stage the user is actively viewing or editing right now. |\n| `resume_stage` | Earliest stage that still needs work when a session is reopened. |\n| `furthest_completed_stage` | Highest ordered stage that is still valid and completed. |\n| `overall_status` | Session-level rollup such as `draft`, `in_progress`, `completed`, or `needs_regeneration`. |\n| `selected_genre_id` | Accepted genre catalog row for the session. |\n| `selected_tone_profile_id` | Accepted tone profile row for the session. |\n| `selected_pitch_id` | Accepted pitch record. |\n| `selected_character_sheet_id` | Accepted character-sheet record. |\n| `accepted_beat_sheet_id` | Accepted beat-sheet record. |\n| `story_setup_id` | Accepted story-setup preferences record. |\n| `active_composition_job_id` | Current composition job, if writing or rewrite work is running. |\n| `active_audio_job_id` | Current audio job, if narration work is running. |\n| `latest_story_asset_id` | Most recent readable story artifact or aggregate text record. |\n| `latest_audio_asset_id` | Most recent playable final audio artifact. |\n| `created_at`, `updated_at`, `completed_at` | Audit and list-view timestamps. |\n\n`resume_stage` is the key anti-guessing field. The backend computes it from durable stage states so the frontend does not need to infer where to reopen a session by looking at which panels happen to have data.\n\nPrompt 11 keeps the relational core intentionally one-directional where practical: child records\nsuch as pitches, character sheets, beat sheets, and setup revisions point back to the owning\nsession, and the accepted row is tracked on the child record itself. The API snapshot can still\nsurface selected child IDs without forcing the first migration into a web of circular foreign keys.\n\n## Major Entities\n\n| Entity | Durable role | Key fields | Notes |\n| --- | --- | --- | --- |\n| `story_session` | Root aggregate for one bedtime-story project. | IDs, title, stage pointers, overall status, timestamps. | Owns the current accepted choices and job pointers. |\n| `workflow_stage_state` | Per-stage state for the session. | `session_id`, `stage`, `status`, `updated_at`, `last_event_id`. | Stored explicitly so resume does not depend on sparse child tables. |\n| `genre` | Curated genre catalog entry. | slug, label, description, bedtime-safety notes, arc notes. | Backend-owned reference data. |\n| `tone_profile` | Curated tone option linked to a genre. | `genre_id`, slug, label, descriptors, bedtime notes, default planning hints. | Tone choices are filtered by genre. |\n| `story_brief` | User-authored idea plus any normalized planning summary. | raw brief text, normalized summary, revision number. | Keeps user input separate from later generated planning outputs. |\n| `pitch` | One candidate story premise. | batch or generation group, summary, hook, bedtime notes, selection flag. | `selected_pitch_id` on the session represents the accepted pitch; selection does not require a separate table. |\n| `character_sheet` | Accepted cast and character traits for the chosen direction. | protagonist/supporting cast data, revision, generation metadata. | Multiple revisions may exist; the session points at the accepted one. |\n| `beat_sheet` | Structured Save-the-Cat plan. | ordered beats, bedtime-adaptation notes, revision. | Must be editable and versioned. |\n| `story_setup` | Soft planning targets. | target words, target runtime, chapter count, chapter style, notes. | These are guides, not hard constraints. |\n| `composition_job` | Parent job record for writing or rewriting text. | status, progress, attempt count, stop reason, current segment pointer. | Not listed in the prompt title, but needed to make `composition_segment` durable and resumable. |\n| `composition_segment` | One planned or written segment of the story. | segment index, planned summary, text, revision number, superseded segment, status. | Supports interruption, partial persistence, and rewrites of earlier sections. |\n| `audio_job` | Parent job record for narration generation. | voice, speed, music setting, progress, status, compiled asset pointer. | Audio should be resumable and segment-aware. |\n| `export_asset` | Durable artifact metadata for text and audio outputs. | asset kind, storage key, MIME type, byte size, checksum, readiness status. | Covers `.docx`, final audio, and intermediate durable artifacts when needed. |\n| `event_log_entry` | Append-only session history. | actor, event type, stage context, payload with `schema_version`, created_at. | Supports replay, resume hydration, debugging, and audit. |\n\n## Canonical Workflow Stages\n\nThese lowercase identifiers are the wire-format contract. API payloads should use the IDs, not numeric indexes or UI labels.\n\n| Order | Stage ID | UI label | Stage completes when |\n| --- | --- | --- | --- |\n| 1 | `genre` | Genre | The user accepts a genre for the session. |\n| 2 | `tone` | Tone | The user accepts a tone profile for the selected genre. |\n| 3 | `brief` | Story brief | The session has an accepted free-form brief and any required normalized summary. |\n| 4 | `pitches` | Pitches | One pitch is accepted or the user intentionally keeps a current pitch set for further refinement. |\n| 5 | `characters` | Characters | One character sheet is accepted. |\n| 6 | `beats` | Beat sheet | One beat sheet is accepted. |\n| 7 | `story_setup` | Story setup | The user accepts soft targets such as runtime and chapter plan. |\n| 8 | `composition` | Composition | The current story text is complete enough to hand off to narration. |\n| 9 | `audio` | Audio | Final narration assets are generated for the current story text and settings. |\n| 10 | `finalize` | Finalize | Read/listen/download assets are ready for the current accepted story state. |\n\nCurrent code mirrors this contract in:\n\n- `backend/app/models/workflow.py`\n- `frontend/src/features/session/workflowStages.ts`\n\nThe backend remains the authority for validating transitions. The frontend should use the same literal IDs for rendering, navigation, and optimistic display only.\n\n## Stage State Semantics\n\nThe same four-state lifecycle should be used for stage rows and for generated artifacts that can become stale.\n\n| State | Meaning | Example |\n| --- | --- | --- |\n| `draft` | The stage has no accepted durable output yet. Partial input may exist, but the stage is not considered complete. | The user typed part of a brief but has not accepted it yet. |\n| `in_progress` | Durable work is actively being produced or updated. | Pitch generation is running, composition is streaming segments, or audio rendering is underway. |\n| `completed` | The stage has an accepted output that is still valid relative to all upstream dependencies. | A beat sheet was accepted and no upstream planning change has made it stale. |\n| `needs_regeneration` | The stage was completed before, but an upstream change made its accepted output stale. The old output may remain visible for comparison, but it is not the current source of truth. | The user edits characters after a beat sheet exists, so beats, composition, audio, and finalize become stale. |\n\n### Session-Level Rollup\n\nThe session-level `overall_status` should be derived, not manually entered:\n\n- `draft`: no stage has reached `completed` yet.\n- `in_progress`: at least one stage is `in_progress`, or some stages are completed but the session has not reached a valid finalization state.\n- `completed`: `finalize` is `completed` and no stage is `needs_regeneration`.\n- `needs_regeneration`: one or more stages are `needs_regeneration`, even if the session also has readable prior outputs.\n\n## Allowed Forward Progression\n\nThe default happy-path order is linear:\n\n`genre -> tone -> brief -> pitches -> characters -> beats -> story_setup -> composition -> audio -> finalize`\n\nForward movement rule:\n\n- The user may enter the next stage once the current stage is `completed`.\n\nResume rule:\n\n- On reopen, the backend should send the earliest stage whose state is not `completed`.\n- If all stages are `completed`, `resume_stage` is `finalize`.\n\nThis is the behavior implemented by the `resolve_resume_stage` helper in both the backend and frontend contract files.\n\n## Safe Backward Edits and Regeneration Rules\n\nBackward navigation is allowed to any already-reached earlier stage. The important rule is what happens after the user accepts a change there.\n\n| Edited stage | Stages marked `needs_regeneration` after acceptance |\n| --- | --- |\n| `genre` | `tone`, `brief`, `pitches`, `characters`, `beats`, `composition`, `audio`, `finalize` |\n| `tone` | `brief`, `pitches`, `characters`, `beats`, `composition`, `audio`, `finalize` |\n| `brief` | `pitches`, `characters`, `beats`, `composition`, `audio`, `finalize` |\n| `pitches` | `characters`, `beats`, `composition`, `audio`, `finalize` |\n| `characters` | `beats`, `composition`, `audio`, `finalize` |\n| `beats` | `composition`, `audio`, `finalize` |\n| `story_setup` | `composition`, `audio`, `finalize` |\n| `composition` | `audio`, `finalize` |\n| `audio` | `finalize` |\n| `finalize` | none |\n\nWhy `story_setup` is not invalidated by earlier planning edits:\n\n- Word count, runtime, and chapter preferences are user intent, not generated story content.\n- They still influence later composition, but a new pitch or character sheet does not automatically erase the user's preferred target length.\n\n## Composition Interruption and Rewrite Rules\n\nComposition is intentionally more flexible than the earlier planning stages.\n\n- A composition job may move between `in_progress`, paused, resumed, or cancelled states without leaving the `composition` stage.\n- Partial text is persisted segment by segment so a refresh or crash does not erase progress.\n- A rewrite request against an earlier segment creates a new `composition_job` or new segment revision rather than mutating history in place.\n- Superseded segments remain durable for comparison and audit.\n- Any accepted composition rewrite marks `audio` and `finalize` as `needs_regeneration`.\n- If the user decides the plan itself is wrong, they may navigate back to `beats` or `story_setup`, accept changes there, and let the backend mark `composition` and later stages stale.\n\n## Re-entry From Past Sessions\n\nThe system should support these reopen flows without guessing from UI state:\n\n1. Planning session reopened midstream:\n   - Example: `genre`, `tone`, and `brief` are `completed`; `pitches` is `in_progress`.\n   - Result: open the session on `resume_stage = pitches`.\n2. Finished draft reopened for upstream change:\n   - Example: `composition`, `audio`, and `finalize` were `completed`, then the user edits the beat sheet.\n   - Result: `composition`, `audio`, and `finalize` become `needs_regeneration`, and `resume_stage = composition`.\n3. Fully completed story reopened for reading only:\n   - Example: every stage is `completed`.\n   - Result: open on `resume_stage = finalize`, but still allow explicit navigation back to earlier stages for edits.\n\n## Shared Enum and Constants Plan\n\nThe repo does not yet have a generated cross-language schema package, so prompt 10 uses a boring mirrored-contract approach:\n\n- Backend authority: `backend/app/models/workflow.py`\n- Frontend mirror for rendering and client-side navigation: `frontend/src/features/session/workflowStages.ts`\n- Tests on both sides assert the same stage order, lifecycle states, and regeneration map.\n\nRules for later prompts:\n\n- Keep the literal stage IDs stable once APIs start returning them.\n- Keep the literal stage-state values stable once they enter database rows or websocket payloads.\n- If a later prompt introduces JSON Schema or code generation, generate from these same identifiers instead of renaming them.\n- The backend service layer, not the frontend, decides whether a requested stage transition is valid for the current session snapshot.\n", "command": "/bin/zsh -lc \"sed -n '1,220p' docs/domain-model.md\"", "exit_code": 0, "id": "item_32", "status": "completed", "type": "command_execution"}, "type": "item.completed"}, "task_display_context": {"event_number": 65, "prompt_index": 17, "prompt_name": "16 \u2014 Asset Metadata and File Records", "prompt_total": 100}, "timestap": "2026-03-31T23:58:11-07:00"}
